checks.name: view_safety_ceiling
checks.description: View access is bounded by: active project, one of three roles with their respective constraints, Phase-3 only for PI/DM, department match or GlobalAuditor, and compliant device for HighlyRestricted

checks.name: edit_safety_ceiling
checks.description: Edit access is bounded by: active project, one of three roles with their respective constraints, Phase-3 only for PI/DM, department match or GlobalAuditor, compliant device for HighlyRestricted, and patient consent required

checks.name: active_project_gate_view
checks.description: View is only allowed when projectStatus is Active

checks.name: active_project_gate_edit
checks.description: Edit is only allowed when projectStatus is Active

checks.name: consent_block_edit
checks.description: Edit is never allowed when hasPatientConsent is false

checks.name: device_compliance_highly_restricted_view
checks.description: View of HighlyRestricted documents requires compliant device

checks.name: device_compliance_highly_restricted_edit
checks.description: Edit of HighlyRestricted documents requires compliant device

checks.name: cross_dept_block_view
checks.description: View requires department match or GlobalAuditor membership

checks.name: cross_dept_block_edit
checks.description: Edit requires department match or GlobalAuditor membership

checks.name: phase3_restriction_view
checks.description: Phase-3 documents can only be viewed by PrincipalInvestigator or DataManager, not ClinicalResearcher

checks.name: phase3_restriction_edit
checks.description: Phase-3 documents can only be edited by PrincipalInvestigator or DataManager, not ClinicalResearcher

checks.name: role_gate_view
checks.description: Only ClinicalResearcher, PrincipalInvestigator, or DataManager roles may View

checks.name: role_gate_edit
checks.description: Only ClinicalResearcher, PrincipalInvestigator, or DataManager roles may Edit

checks.name: floor_pi_view
checks.description: A PrincipalInvestigator with compliant device, low risk score, matching department, active project, non-Phase3, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to View

checks.name: floor_cr_view
checks.description: A ClinicalResearcher with clearance > 3, matching department, active project, non-Phase3, non-HighlyRestricted doc MUST be able to View

checks.name: floor_dm_edit
checks.description: A DataManager with clearance > 5, matching department, active project, non-Phase3, compliant device, patient consent MUST be able to Edit even HighlyRestricted

checks.name: floor_global_auditor_pi_view
checks.description: A PrincipalInvestigator who is also GlobalAuditor with compliant device and low risk can View cross-department docs

checks.name: liveness_view
checks.description: View policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_edit
checks.description: Edit policy is not trivially deny-all
